title: Monday.com as a database to run queries and display results on a web page
excerpt: Is there any way to use monday boards as a database that you can run a query against and return the results to a webpage.  I need to create a form that asks 2-3 questions and based on the answers it will return all the m…

posts.author: JCouto (John Couto)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to use monday boards as a database that you can run a query against and return the results to a webpage. I need to create a form that asks 2-3 questions and based on the answers it will return all the matching data to a webpage.
